title: RabbitMQ Message Redelivery Rate Spike
spl:
index=messaging sourcetype="rabbitmq:queue"
| eval redeliver_rate=coalesce(message_stats.redeliver_details.rate, redeliver_rate, 0)
| where redeliver_rate > 5
| timechart span=5m sum(redeliver_rate) as redeliver_eps by vhost, name
description: Sustained redeliveries indicate consumers that ack late, crash mid-processing, or encounter poison messages—often before queue depth alarms fire.
value: Surfaces flaky consumers and retry storms that waste broker resources and inflate end-to-end latency.
implementation: Normalize field names after JSON extraction (some collectors flatten with underscores). Baseline per queue. Alert when redeliver rate exceeds historical p95 for 15 minutes.
visualization: Line chart (redeliver rate by queue), Table (worst queues), Single value (cluster redeliver EPS).
grandmaExplanation: We watch when the same messages are being tried again and again, which usually means a worker keeps failing or crashing.
